note: B10-import-replacement task corpus. Slice 2 adds the first import-heavy demo task (validate-rfc5321-email). See plans/wi-512-s2-b10-demo-task.md.

arm_b_prompt.system_prompt: You are an expert TypeScript developer. When given a coding task, implement it in a single TypeScript file. Output only the implementation code in a ```typescript code block. Do not include explanation before or after the code block.
arm_b_prompt.user_prompt_template:
Implement a TypeScript function with this signature: function validateRfc5321Email(input: string): boolean

Behavior:
Validate whether a string is a valid RFC 5321 email address. Returns true iff the input parses as a single mailbox per RFC 5321 §4.1.2 (local-part '@' domain), with no display name, no UTF-8 local parts, and a TLD required on the domain part.

Throw appropriate Error subclasses (SyntaxError or RangeError) for invalid input.
